description: Style Notemumbai slang sets cosmo street trends with their printed kurtas. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look more tempered can pair it with jeans and flat sandals for a sweet chic look.Product DetailsPink printed short kurta, has a round neckline, full buttoned placket, pint tucks from the neckline to the waist, draw string tie at the waist on the sides, short sleeves with buttoned cuffs and gathers from the back yoke.Material and Care100% cottonWash using a mild detergentDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size MStyle NoteMumbai Slang sets cosmo street trends with their printed top. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look more tempered can pair it with jeans and flat sandals for a sweet chic look.Product DetailsPink printed short top, has a round neckline, full buttoned placket, pint tucks from the neckline to the waist, draw string tie at the waist on the sides, short sleeves with buttoned cuffs and gathers from the back yoke.Material and Care100% cottonWash using a mild detergentDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
